channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jake Hall dies in accidental glass door incident; ex-partner shares grief
item.description: Jake Hall, 35, a former star of the reality series The Only Way Is Essex, tragically died after an accident at a villa in Majorca. Police reports indicate Hall had been out partying and returned to hi...

item.title: Canadian Anthropologists Reveal Identities of Franklin Expedition Crew Using DNA
item.description: Canadian anthropologists have made significant breakthroughs in uncovering the fates of the 1845 Franklin Expedition, where 134 men disappeared in the High Arctic while seeking the Northwest Passage. ...

item.title: Sindh Government Imposes Conditions on Aurat March Participants
item.description: The Sindh government has issued a 28-point list of restrictions on the Aurat March in Karachi, highlighting the ongoing struggle for women's rights in Pakistan. The organisers requested permission to ...

item.title: Former KZN Health MEC Peggy Nkonyeni Returns to Court on 2006 Hospital Procurement Corruption Charges
item.description: Former KwaZulu-Natal finance and health MEC Peggy Nkonyeni has been pulled out of retirement to face corruption charges linked to the 2006 Amigos hospital scam. The 64-year-old appeared in the Pieterm...

item.title: Gelatin explosives found near PM Modi's event venue in Bengaluru, investigation underway
item.description: On Sunday morning, two gelatin sticks were discovered on a roadside near Tataguni, within the Kaggalipura police station limits, close to a route used by Prime Minister Narendra Modi during his visit ...

item.title: Comelec reports 4.49 million voter registrants for upcoming barangay and SK elections
item.description: According to the Commission on Elections (Comelec), a total of 4.49 million individuals have already registered as voters for the barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections, with only nine days ...

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak on MV Hondius Cruise Impacts Passengers from 13 Countries
item.description: A hantavirus outbreak linked to the MV Hondius cruise ship has resulted in three fatalities and confirmed cases among passengers from multiple countries. The World Health Organization (WHO) confirmed ...

item.title: Frontier Airlines Flight Hits Pedestrian on Denver Runway, Evacuation Ensues
item.description: On the night of May 9, 2026, Frontier Airlines Flight 4345, departing Denver International Airport for Los Angeles, struck and killed an individual who had breached airport security and ran onto the r...

item.title: Police officer injured while responding to unauthorised party near Mandurah
item.description: A police officer was assaulted while attempting to disperse an unauthorised party near Mandurah. The incident occurred when the officer attended the gathering to ensure public safety and enforce local...

item.title: Kremlin indicates Ukraine peace deal remains distant despite temporary ceasefire
item.description: The Kremlin has indicated that achieving a peace deal to end the ongoing conflict in Ukraine remains a distant prospect. Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov stated that while the United States appears ...

item.title: Legendary WHL coach Ernie ‘Punch’ McLean dies at 93 in single-vehicle crash in northern B.C.
item.description: The Canadian hockey community is mourning the loss of Ernie ‘Punch’ McLean, a legendary coach who passed away at the age of 93 in a single-vehicle crash in northern British Columbia. RCMP confirmed Mc...

item.title: Baguio City warns public against unlicensed motorcycle taxis
item.description: Baguio City Mayor Benjamin Magalong has issued a warning to residents and visitors regarding the use of unauthorized motorcycle-for-hire services, commonly known as angkas. Authorities have observed a...

item.title: Montreal experiences surge in Canadiens playoff excitement and local business activity
item.description: Montreal is witnessing a remarkable surge in enthusiasm for the Canadiens this playoff season. Domenico Perrazino, affectionately known as “Ménick,” a well-known Montreal barber who has served the cit...

item.title: Trump and GOP Gain Momentum as Court Rulings Affect Congressional Redistricting
item.description: President Donald Trump and Republican leaders are leveraging recent court rulings to reshape congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. The Virginia Supreme Court struck down a Democrat-b...

item.title: Mpumalanga Police Diver Recovers Crocodile Suspected of Attacking Missing Businessman
item.description: Police diver Capt Johan “Pottie” Potgieter had a remarkable day last Saturday when he was lowered by helicopter into the Komati River to recover a 500kg Nile crocodile suspected of killing a missing b...

item.title: Europe accelerates production of affordable drones and autonomous weapons amid defence concerns
item.description: European countries are intensifying efforts to establish defence sovereignty by developing low-cost, often autonomous, weaponry, particularly drones. Startups across the UK, Portugal, Germany, and Fra...

item.title: Mohanlal returns as Georgekutty in 'Drishyam 3' trailer ahead of May 21 release
item.description: The much-awaited trailer of Jeethu Joseph’s Malayalam film 'Drishyam 3' has been released, and it brings back Mohanlal in the iconic role of Georgekutty, who once again finds himself in a tense situat...

item.title: 96-Year-Old Runner Continues Participating in Toronto 10K Race
item.description: At 96 years old, a Toronto resident continues to participate in the city's Sporting Life 10K race, demonstrating remarkable endurance and passion for running. The athlete has made this annual event a ...

item.title: PTCL to Carry Out Submarine Cable Maintenance Causing Possible Internet Slowdown in Evening Hours from May 11 to 18
item.description: Pakistan Telecommunication Company Ltd (PTCL) has informed its customers that they may experience internet service degradation during evening hours from May 11 to May 18, 2026. This is due to planned ...

item.title: 52 Writers Share Their Most Memorable Sandwich Experiences
item.description: This article explores the most memorable sandwiches experienced by 52 writers from around the world. From a crab stick and taramasalata baguette in Barons Court to a vegetarian Christmas focaccia in G...
